title: Half Life: cuted content
description: Half Life: Cutted content - is a mod that adds and improves cuted/unused contet from half life and portal games
body:
![mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9ca9aed426fa9910ddb26ab29ab505f9dd9ee87_0.webp)
This mod adds and improves cuted mobs, blocks, items etc from half-life.
Most of them were taken from official concept arts, like strider, gunship, alien grunt and etc. Some were cute fromthe games, like snapbug. And also there's new mobs that were based on concept arts, like snapbug zombie and snapbug gonome.

new demension - xen

you will be able to find brocken machines in overworld with portal to xen
 
<details>

- Antlion

- Headcrab

- Headcrab zombie

- Snapbug

- Strider

- Snapbug zombie

- Snapbug gonome

- Snarlock

- Gunship

- Alien grunt
<summary>New mobs</summary>




</details>





![gecko](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d0b0d83c26524daa0e6aa67a24d0f059f3ae237.png)
